response.text:
REJECT

rationale: My SoC is critically low (25.1%) and below my own minimum survival threshold (50%); sharing would jeopardize my essential reserves in a cluster-wide scarcity condition.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.26 below share threshold; requesting energy via owner circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r2c1'].
Your latest belief: Critical survival mode: SoC 25.1% declining at 1 kW load. All outbound sharing halted to defend ~3.5 kWh minimum survival margin. Cluster-wide scarcity detected; r0c5 and r2c1 unable/unwilling to provide relief. Recovery requires grid reconnection, external supply, or load reduction. No sharing until SoC recovers above 50%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
